name: SM16716 LED driver
description: The SM16716 output component exposes a SM16716 channel of a global [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/sm16716#sm16716-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Chose the channel of the SM16716 chain of this output component.

config_entries.label: Sm16716 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/sm16716#sm16716-component). Use this if you have multiple SM16716 chains you want to use at the same time.
